ai_summary: Aarvi Encon Limited has announced its 38th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held virtually on August 14, 2026, to discuss financial matters for the year ended March 31, 2026. A key takeaway for investors is the dividend record date of August 07, 2026, establishing eligibility for any declared dividends which will be paid within 30 days post-AGM. This is a routine regulatory disclosure providing essential shareholder information and contains no apparent red flags.
